info.name: OmniCharge API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for the OmniCharge microservices platform. Covers Auth, User, Operator, Recharge, Payment services with pre-request scripts, test assertions, auto-saved tokens/IDs, and negative test cases.

item.name: 🔐 Auth Service
item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, login, token management, password change, logout. No auth required unless noted.

exec: console.log('[Register User] Sending registration request for testuser@omnicharge.com');
pm.test('Response has user object with userId', function () {
console.log('[Register Admin] Sending admin registration request for admin@omnicharge.com');
pm.test('Response has user with ADMIN role', function () {

console.log('[Login Invalid Email] Testing rejection of malformed email');

pm.test('Response does not contain accessToken', function () {
if (!token) { console.warn('[Validate Token] accessToken is empty — run Login User first'); }
else { console.log('[Validate Token] Validating token:', token.substring(0, 20) + '...'); }
if (!rt) { console.warn('[Refresh Token] refreshToken is empty — run Login User first'); }
else { console.log('[Refresh Token] Using refreshToken:', rt.substring(0, 20) + '...'); }
console.log('[Change Password] Changing password for current user');
console.log('[Login New Password] Verifying login works with new password');
console.log('[Logout All] Revoking all sessions for current user');
console.log('[Login After Logout All] Re-authenticating after logout-all');
console.log('[Login After Logout All] accessToken updated');
console.log('[Login After Logout All] refreshToken updated');
console.log('[Login Final] Final login to get fresh tokens for remaining tests');

item.name: 📡 Operator Service
item.description: Telecom operator and recharge plan management. Public GET endpoints; admin POST/PUT/DELETE require ADMIN role.

item.name: 🔋 Recharge Service

item.name: 🏥 Health Checks
item.description: Actuator health endpoints for all microservices. No auth required.

exec: console.log('[API Gateway Health] Checking API Gateway health at', pm.collectionVariables.get('baseUrl'));
console.log('[Auth Service Health] Checking Auth Service health at port 8086');
console.log('[User Service Health] Checking User Service health at port 8081');
console.log('[Recharge Service Health] Checking Recharge Service health at port 8082');
console.log('[Payment Service Health] Checking Payment Service health at port 8083');
console.log('[Operator Service Health] Checking Operator Service health at port 8084');
console.log('[Notification Service Health] Checking Notification Service health at port 8085');
